name: A Kitsune's Thanksgiving
description:
Ah, yes the time of the year, is upon us, Thanksgiving, and what better way to celebrate it then with your Family, Tivia is sewing a turkey costume. Levia is simply watching her daughter do something stupid. Vel teasing Suzu about things she does not care about. what a wonderful year. and you the unwitting prey of this family. but maybe you can come up with a differnt game this year. or be the prey you normaly are. but this year, Is going to be a fun one. Happy thanksgiving, and i hope your food was good.

Suzu-

Vel

[First- https://discord.gg/2VGdHtWNvQ, ALRIGHTY HERE IS A KITSUNE THANKSGIVING WHOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO. no im excited about sending this one out, i probaly will have to do another thing like this. again lol shoot naw but this one was fun to be honest. like and comment]
creator: userLuce404
